channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet

item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Long line of potholes, 1st May
item.description:
These potholes have been here for months. A lot of people have complained about the potholes, but the council just fix songle potholes and leave the rest. Must someone get hurt before the council resurface the road. Now that local elections are near maybe the problem will be resolved

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cockfosters Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

item.title: Outside 2 Redington Road, 1st May
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Redington Road, West Hampstead, Greater London

item.title: Concrete lifted at bottom of d/way at 81 Sutherland Ave, Welling, 1st May

item.title: Locked gate, 1st May
item.description:

item.title: Trip hazard, path not fixed, 1st May
item.description:
I reported this problem almost a year back. You closed the report and said there was a park infrastructure taking place to look at issues. This path is getting worse and is a potential danger for pedestrians and needs to be fixed before someone trips and falls for which the Council would be accountable.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Court Road, Ramsden, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
